recommendations.title: La Belle Verte
recommendations.overview: As part of an intergalactic coalition, a well-meaning space alien volunteers to bring a message of self-actualization and harmony with nature to the one planet rejected by all her peers as incorrigible: Earth.

recommendations.title: The Crisis
recommendations.overview: Victor is a legal advisor who finds himself abandoned by his wife and fired the same day. He tries to seek comfort from different friends and family members, but everyone he meets is concerned with their own problems. His morale begins to falter when

recommendations.title: Three Men and a Cradle
recommendations.overview: Three young men - Jacques, Pierre, and Michel - share an apartment in Paris, and have many girlfriends and parties. Once, during a party, a friend of Jacques' tells him he has a quite compromising package to deliver, and asks him if he can leave it d

recommendations.title: The Way
recommendations.overview: When his son dies while hiking the famed Camino de Santiago pilgrimage route in the Pyrenees, Tom flies to France to claim the remains. Looking for insights into his estranged child’s life, he decides to complete the 500-mile mountain trek to Spain.

recommendations.title: Do It Like An Hombre
recommendations.overview: Raúl, Eduardo and Santiago have led a happy and "straight" life since their childhood, until, one day, Santiago confesses to them that he is gay.

recommendations.title: An American Werewolf in London
recommendations.overview: American tourists David and Jack are savagely attacked by an unidentified animal while hiking on the Yorkshire Moors. After retiring to the home of a beautiful nurse to recuperate, David soon begins experiencing disturbing changes to his body and min

recommendations.title: The Marquez-Castillo Siblings
recommendations.overview: A group of four siblings compete for the heritage of their father.

recommendations.title: Arthur
recommendations.overview: Arthur is a 30-year-old child who will inherit $750 million if he complies with his family's demands and marries the woman of their choosing.

recommendations.title: Goodbye June
recommendations.overview: Four siblings' lives change drastically when their ailing mother takes a turn for the worse over the holiday season.

recommendations.title: Wild
recommendations.overview: A woman with a tragic past decides to start her new life by hiking for one thousand miles on the Pacific Crest Trail.
